dialog.css: .p-dialog {white-space: pre-line;} .p-dialog .p-dialog-header {margin-bottom: 1.75rem;} .p-dialog .p-dialog-title {color: var(--p-spring-200);} .p-dialog .p-dialog-content {align-items: flex-start; min-height: 4.6rem;} .p-dialog .p-dialog-footer {margin-top: 1.75rem; justify-content: center;} .p-dialog .p-dialog-footer button {background: var(--p-dialog-button-background); border-color: var(--p-spring-200); min-width: 7.875rem; outline: none;} .p-dialog .p-dialog-footer button:hover {background: var(--p-dialog-button-background); border-color: var(--p-dialog-button-border-color);} .p-dialog .p-dialog-footer button:not(:disabled):active {background: var(--p-dialog-button-background); border-color: var(--p-dialog-button-border-color);} .p-dialog .p-dialog-footer button:disabled {background: var(--p-dialog-button-disabled-background); color: var(--p-dialog-button-disabled-color); border-color: var(--p-dialog-button-disabled-border-color);} .p-dialog.low-header .p-dialog-header  {margin-bottom: 0; padding-bottom: 0;}

select.css: .p-select-option.p-select-option-selected {cursor: default;} .p-select-overlay {padding-top: var(--p-select-overlay-border-radius); padding-bottom: var(--p-select-overlay-border-radius);} .p-select .p-select-label {font-size: var(--p-form-field-font-size);} .p-select .p-select-option {font-size: var(--p-form-field-font-size);} .p-select.p-disabled .p-select-dropdown  {color: var(--p-select-disabled-color);}
